2604.23615.title: Applications of the Transformer Architecture in AI-Assisted English Reading Comprehension
2604.23615.paper_summary: This paper studies interpretable and fair artificial intelligence architectures for understanding English reading. Introduced transformer-based models, integrating advanced attention mechanisms and gradient-based feature attribution. The model's lack of interpretability, reduction of algorithmic bias, and unreliable performance in learning environments are the current issues faced in natural language teaching. A unified technical pipeline has been constructed, including adversarial bias correction methods, token-level attribution analysis, and multi-head attention heatmap visualization. Experimental validation was conducted using a large-scale labeled English reading comprehension dataset, and the data partitioning scheme and parameter optimization procedures have been determined. The method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art models for this task in terms of accuracy and macro-average F1 score; in some aspects, it even surpasses or closely matches the results of human evaluations. In multi-week user experiments, the explainable transformer improved teachers' trust and operability in feedback-based assessments within the scoring system. The proposed method aims to ensure high prediction accuracy and fairness for different learners. This indicates that it is a real-world educational application based on artificial intelligence with a focus on interpretation. Improve the user experience in AI-assisted reading comprehension systems, counteract biases, and enhance the details explained by transformers.
2604.23615.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文研究了可解釋且公平的人工智慧架構，以理解英語閱讀。引入了基於Transformer的模型，整合了先進的注意力機制和基於梯度的特徵歸因。該模型缺乏可解釋性、算法偏見的減少以及在學習環境中的不可靠表現是當前自然語言教學面臨的問題。已構建一個統一的技術流程，包括對抗性偏見修正方法、標記級歸因分析和多頭注意力熱圖可視化。實驗驗證是使用大規模標記的英語閱讀理解數據集進行的，數據劃分方案和參數優化程序已經確定。該方法在準確性和宏觀平均F1分數方面顯著超越了該任務的最先進模型；在某些方面，它甚至超越或接近人類評估的結果。在多週用戶實驗中，可解釋的Transformer提高了教師在基於反饋的評估中的信任度和可操作性。所提出的方法旨在確保不同學習者的高預測準確性和公平性。這表明它是一個基於人工智慧的現實世界教育應用，重點放在解釋上。改善AI輔助閱讀理解系統中的用戶體驗，對抗偏見，並增強Transformer所解釋的細節。
2604.23615.author: Ping Li et.al.
